content.en:
Another long time has passed.

On this day, there is good news.

Ye Tian's daughter, Ye Xingyue, successfully recovered the Eternal Dao Seed and could once again impact the high-level realm divine cultivators.

"Xingyue, these resources are given to you, you have a failed experience, and the success rate of this breakthrough is still very high. "

Ye Tian said.

"Father, I will definitely guarantee a breakthrough!"

Ye Xingyue said.

She knew very well that every time she failed to break through, she would waste countless resources, and those resources were unimaginable to the high-level realm gods of other forces, and if they were used to cultivate ordinary realm gods, they could cultivate a large number of ordinary realm gods.

So, she can't continue to waste resources.

"This time it must be a breakthrough!"

Ye Xingyue said darkly.

......

Soon, Ye Xingyue adjusted his state and began to attack the high-level realm god realm for the second time.

She took all kinds of resources that helped cultivate the seventh Eternal Realm Spirit, and then refined and cultivated the Eternal Realm Spirit, cultivating it little by little.

In this way, her Eternal Dao Seed was absorbed by the Eternal Realm Spirit Phantom, making the Eternal Realm Spirit Phantom more and more condensed.

I don't know how long it has been, Ye Xingyue's Eternal Realm Spirit has finally been completely formed, and the whole process has not been turbulent at all, and the breakthrough process is very smooth.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Xingyue's cultivation began to transform, and his physical body began to become stronger, but the weakness of the Eternal Dao Seed could not be recovered for the time being, and it took a period of cultivation before he could slowly recover the Eternal Dao Seed and get through the period of weakness.

Seeing that Ye Xingyue had already broken through, Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief, stopped guarding, and left silently.

With Ye Xingyue's breakthrough, the human race currently has four high-level realm gods, but the middle-level peak realm gods have not yet reached ten.

However, Ye Xingchen had already begun to vigorously cultivate the mid-level peak realm gods, and at present, twenty realm gods had been selected, vigorously cultivating them, and providing resources at all costs.

But whether these realm gods can break through successfully every time depends on themselves.

Once the breakthrough fails once, it will take a long time to recover the Eternal Dao Seed, and it will be impossible to continue cultivating.

Therefore, among these twenty realm gods, they will be eliminated one after another, and it is difficult to say whether ten middle-level peak realm gods can be born in the end.

Time flies.

100 billion to the Dao Era!

200 billion to the Dao Era!

500 billion to the Dao Era!

Such a long time passed, and finally on this day, the first mid-level peak realm god of the human race after Ye Tian was born.

"Father, I have successfully cultivated the first mid-level peak realm god.!"

Ye Xingchen came to Ye Tian excitedly.

"Who is it?"

Ye Tian didn't pay much attention to the cultivation of these realm gods, so he didn't know who broke through to the mid-level peak realm gods.

"It's your grandson Ye Xu!"

Ye Xingchen said.

"It turned out to be this little guy!" Ye Tian smiled.

Ye Xingchen gave birth to many sons, and these sons have many heirs, so there are too many Ye family members, all over the human race, but he still knows a little about his grandson's generation.

Ye Xu's talent potential is not the highest, and he is not the first batch to break through to the realm god, but he didn't expect to catch up.

"I thought it was the other few who would be the first to break through, but I didn't expect it to be Ye Xu, this little guy, broke through!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

Ye Xingchen said: "It is mainly a few middle-level realm gods who have the hope of breaking through first, and they failed to break through when cultivating the sixth eternal realm spirit, Ye Xu has successfully broken through all of them, and he has not failed once, so he can be the first to break through to the middle-level peak realm gods." It won't be long before there will be other mid-level realm gods who will break through to the mid-level peak realm god level. "

"Very good, once you have gathered ten mid-level peak realm gods, tell me immediately!"

Ye Tian said.

"Yes!"

Ye Xingchen responded.

In the years that followed, one mid-level peak realm god after another of the human race was born.

And the death zone of the Eternal Kingdom is constantly dissipating and is rapidly recovering.

Today, one in five dead zones has recovered.

"All the forces in the entire Realm God Realm are trying to send a group of creatures and Realm Gods into the Eternal Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered. []

Even the supreme forces finally intervened, but these supreme forces did not occupy much territory, perhaps for them, whether it was the Eternal Realm or the Realm God Realm, the size of these territories did not mean to them.

For them, it is enough to have a site as a branch.

this day.

The Realm Court Headquarters issued an order to allow the Realm Gods' Realm, the Medium Forces, and the Powerful Powers to relocate to the Eternal Realm.

However, once you choose to relocate, you must relocate all of them and abandon the territory of the realm god realm, otherwise you will not be allowed to relocate.

But this rule does not restrict the Terrans, after all, the Terrans themselves own territory in two places.

This rule only restricts those who are only in the realm of the gods and the powerful forces.

Those powerful forces have a lot of territory in the realm of the Realm God Realm, and their forces are intricate, and it is impossible to easily give up the original territory and go to the Eternal Realm to have a future.

Therefore, these powerful forces have almost given up on this plan.

But those medium-sized forces, the territory is not large, if they enter the Eternal Realm, they will definitely be able to occupy many Eternal Realms, which is much more comfortable than the Realm God Realm.

And in the eternal realm, there is also hope to get other opportunities in the future, so you can give it a go.

That's it.

A large number of medium powers have entered the Eternal Realm, occupying many ownerless territories.

And the middle forces in the realm of the realm god realm are much less.

......

"'The Old Mountains have gone to the Eternal Border?'"

This is the news reported by the gods of the realm below.

The realm of the gods, the (good) Terran holy kingdom near the middle forces of the old mountain directly moved away, to the eternal realm.

Ye Tian thought about it carefully, and knew why the old mountain was relocated.

First of all, the old mountain was trembling near the Terran Holy Country, for fear that one day it would be destroyed by the Terran Holy Country, and the strength of the Old Sun Mountain was greatly damaged, and it almost couldn't even maintain the strength of the middle forces.

And they saw no hope at all, so they simply relocated to the Eternal Border, and maybe there was still hope to rise.

For them, the benefits of relocating are greater than they are now.

In this regard, Ye Tian did not interfere.

Anyway, he had already taught the Old Sun Mountain a lesson, and no matter how the Old Sun Mountain developed, it was impossible to threaten the Terrans.

In the blink of an eye, a long time has passed.

this day.

Ye Xingchen came to find Ye Tian.

"Father, our human race has already gathered ten mid-level peak realm gods!" Ye Xingchen said excitedly.
